name: Obby Ride a Bike For Brainrots
description: Welcome to Obby Ride a Bike For Brainrots! Speed through obstacle courses while keeping your balance! Jump across crazy obby stages filled with tricky challenges! ‍ Be careful — one mistake and you’ll fall into the void! Collect Brainrots to boost your income and progress faster! Upgrade your base to unlock more slots and grow stronger! Keep riding, improving, and conquer every obby stage!
instructions: Ride your bike overcome obstacles upgrade your bike and base Merge Brainrots Collect a seceret creatures
